narrative:
Precinct Sylvania City 9 (precinct in Lucas County) has 994 registered voters, with 59.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.4 percentage points.
